basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Pune
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Pune has invited applications from Indian nationals for the position of Project Associate-I purely on temporary and contractual basis under the funded project titled “Multidisciplinary data-driven present-day thermochemical and thermomechanical structure of the Himalaya and Tibet: implications for geodynamic evolution”. The project is sponsored by Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF). The last date to submit applications is 18 July 2026.

age_limit.details: Not more than 35 years as on the last date of application. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications/experience with prior approval of competent authority.

qualification.details: MS / M.Sc. in Geophysics / Geological Science / Earth Science / Applied Geology / Applied Geophysics with CGPA ≥ 8.0 or equivalent grade/percentage. | Preference: Candidates with prior research experience in Solid Earth Geophysics and Geodynamics, knowledge of Python programming, bash shell scripting, and Linux-Ubuntu will be preferred. | Job Requirements: The incumbent is expected to help in relevant data analysis. | Rs. 30,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance Rs. 37,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance (for scholars selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship/Assistant Professorship or GATE or through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies/Institutions).

how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application format available on the IISER Pune website (Apply Now link below the advertisement).
Fill the form and convert it into PDF format.
Email the application to [email protected] on or before 18 July 2026.
Mention “Project Associate-I and Advt. No. 51/2026” in the subject line of the email.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email and their details will be uploaded on the institute website.
Documents to be submitted later (if shortlisted):
Photocopies of certificates in support of age, educational qualifications, experience etc.
important_instructions: The appointment is purely temporary and will terminate automatically on completion/termination of the project. The selected candidate shall have no claim for regular appointment/absorption in IISER Pune or the funding agency. The terms and conditions of the funding agency will govern the appointment. Mere possession of minimum qualifications does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview. The Project Investigator may restrict the number of candidates for interview based on recommendations of the Screening Committee. Candidates should mention all relevant qualifications and experience in the application.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_science_education_an: Multidisciplinary data-driven present-day thermochemical and thermomechanical structure of the Himalaya and Tibet: implications for geodynamic evolution

content_sections.heading: Minimum Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: MS / M.Sc. in Geophysics / Geological Science / Earth Science / Applied Geology / Applied Geophysics with CGPA ≥ 8.0 or equivalent grade/percentage. Preference: Candidates with prior research experience in Solid Earth Geophysics and Geodynamics, knowledge of Python programming, bash shell scripting, and Linux-Ubuntu will be preferred. Job Requirements: The incumbent is expected to help in relevant data analysis. Rs. 30,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance Rs. 37,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance (for scholars selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship/Assistant Professorship or GATE or through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies/Institutions).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Not more than 35 years as on the last date of application. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications/experience with prior approval of competent authority.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IISER Pune Project Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Documents to be submitted later (if shortlisted): Photocopies of certificates in support of age, educational qualifications, experience etc. Recent passport size colour photograph.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The appointment is purely temporary and will terminate automatically on completion/termination of the project. The selected candidate shall have no claim for regular appointment/absorption in IISER Pune or the funding agency. The terms and conditions of the funding agency will govern the appointment. Mere possession of minimum qualifications does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview. The Project Investigator may restrict the number of candidates for interview based on recommendations of the Screening Committee. Candidates should mention all relevant qualifications and experience in the application.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 18 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in IISER Pune Advertisement No. 51/2026?
faq.answer: Only 01 (One) post of Project Associate-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: Rs. 30,000/- + 30% HRA (or Rs. 37,000/- + 30% HRA for NET/GATE qualified candidates).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IISER Pune Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: MS/M.Sc. in Geophysics/Geological Science/Earth Science/Applied Geology/Applied Geophysics with CGPA ≥ 8.0 or equivalent.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project duration for IISER Pune ANRF Project?
faq.answer: Initially 3 months, extendable further subject to satisfactory performance and requirement.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IISER Pune Project Associate vacancy?
faq.answer: Send the filled application in PDF format to [email protected] with subject “Project Associate-I and Advt. No. 51/2026”.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE qualification beneficial for IISER Pune Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Yes, GATE or CSIR-UGC NET qualified candidates will receive higher emoluments (Rs. 37,000/- + HRA).

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be an interview for shortlisted candidates at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be informed by email and called for selection process.

faq.question: Q10. Is prior research experience mandatory for IISER Pune Geophysics Project?
faq.answer: Prior experience in Solid Earth Geophysics, Geodynamics, Python, and Linux is highly preferred but not mandatory.
